phrases.en: Tom bought a ticket from the ticket machine.
phrases.zh: 汤姆从售票机买了一张票。

phrases.en: Other passengers bought tickets at the ticket window.
phrases.zh: 其他乘客在售票窗口买票。

phrases.en: Tom inserted his ticket into the slot in the turnstile.
phrases.zh: 汤姆把票插进闸机的投票口。

phrases.en: The gate opened and Tom walked through.
phrases.zh: 闸门打开了，汤姆走了过去。

phrases.en: He followed the signs to his gate.
phrases.zh: 他按照指示牌走向自己的检票口。

phrases.en: He waited on the platform next to the track.
phrases.zh: 他在站台上紧挨着轨道等车。

phrases.en: After his train arrived, he got on.
phrases.zh: 他的火车到了之后，他上了车。

phrases.en: The train was crowded, so he had to stand.
phrases.zh: 车上很挤，所以他只好站着。
广播报到了他要下的站。
